characters.name: Protagonist 1
characters.physical_description: The protagonist's physical appearance should reflect their inner journey.
characters.motivation: To overcome their core wound and achieve their goal.
characters.voice_notes: Distinctive speech pattern that sets them apart.
characters.costume_notes: Clothing that evolves with their character arc.
characters.visual_anchor: A distinctive visual element that identifies them instantly.
characters.backstory: A past event that shaped their core wound or desire.
characters.character_sheet_prompt: Character reference sheet, full body and portrait, Protagonist 1. The protagonist's physical appearance should reflect their inner journey.. Costume: Clothing that evolves with their character arc.. Personality: determined, flawed, relatable. Visual anchor: A distinctive visual element that identifies them instantly.. Style: cinematic, 35mm film, anamorphic lens, production still. Tone: Noir Thriller.
characters.character_sheet_negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, deformed, watermark, text overlay

characters.name: Antagonist 2
characters.physical_description: Physically imposing or subtly menacing presence.
characters.motivation: To achieve their goal at any cost, even if it harms others.
characters.visual_anchor: A signature prop or visual motif.
characters.backstory: A motivation that makes them sympathetic despite their actions.
characters.arc_summary: Their plan threatens the protagonist's world.
characters.character_sheet_prompt: Character reference sheet, full body and portrait, Antagonist 2. Physically imposing or subtly menacing presence.. Costume: Sharp, dark, or authoritative clothing.. Personality: ruthless, calculating, charismatic. Visual anchor: A signature prop or visual motif.. Style: cinematic, 35mm film, anamorphic lens, production still. Tone: Noir Thriller.
characters.character_sheet_negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, deformed, watermark, text overlay

characters.name: Mentor 3
characters.motivation: To ensure the protagonist succeeds where they once failed.
characters.backstory: A past failure that drives their desire to guide the protagonist.
characters.arc_summary: Passes the torch to the protagonist.
characters.character_sheet_prompt: Character reference sheet, full body and portrait, Mentor 3. Weathered, experienced, wise appearance.. Costume: Practical, worn clothing suggesting experience.. Personality: wise, patient, eccentric. Visual anchor: A distinctive accessory or mannerism.. Style: cinematic, 35mm film, anamorphic lens, production still. Tone: Noir Thriller.

characters.name: Ally 4
characters.motivation: To help the protagonist succeed and protect their bond.
characters.backstory: A shared history or bond with the protagonist.
characters.arc_summary: Supports the protagonist through the journey.
characters.character_sheet_prompt: Character reference sheet, full body and portrait, Ally 4. Approachable, friendly appearance.. Costume: Casual, practical clothing.. Personality: loyal, humorous, resourceful. Visual anchor: A distinctive style or accessory.. Style: cinematic, 35mm film, anamorphic lens, production still. Tone: Noir Thriller.

characters.name: Sidekick 5
characters.physical_description: Smaller, less imposing than the protagonist.
characters.motivation: To prove their worth and earn the protagonist's respect.
characters.backstory: Admires the protagonist and wants to prove themselves.
characters.arc_summary: Grows from eager follower to independent hero.
characters.character_sheet_prompt: Character reference sheet, full body and portrait, Sidekick 5. Smaller, less imposing than the protagonist.. Costume: Colorful or distinctive clothing..
